site.name: InBrowser.App
site.description: Free browser-based tools that run entirely on your device.

metadata.homeDescription: A collection of free, privacy-friendly utilities that run entirely in your browser. No uploads, no servers, no tracking.
metadata.toolsDescription: Browse and search all available browser-based tools.

home.title: Browser-based tools that respect your privacy
home.description: Every tool runs locally in your browser. Your data never leaves your device.
home.eyebrow: {count} tools · Open source · Runs 100% in your browser
home.featureNoUploadsDescription: Files are processed on your device and never sent anywhere.
home.featureNoServersDescription: Everything computes locally — open source and auditable.
home.featureOfflineDescription: Installable as a PWA — tools keep working without a network.

tools.title: All Tools
tools.emptyRegistryDescription: Tools are being added — check back soon.
tools.emptySearchDescription: Try a different keyword or clear the search.
